scripts.build: cd client && npm ci --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../rust && cargo build --release -p sim-server
scripts.desktop: npm run build && cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo run
scripts.dist: npm run build && cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo build --release
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo build --release
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && cd desktop/src-tauri && cargo build --release
scripts.test: cd rust && cargo test -p sim-server -- --test-threads=1 && cd ../client && npm test
